svg.text: fenceline — the no-touch zones of your repo, declared in one file
$ fenceline init --preset node
wrote fenceline.json (preset node: 5 zones, 8 embedded tests)
next: fenceline test && fenceline hooks claude-code
$ fenceline check package-lock.json src/app.ts
BLOCK package-lock.json [zone lockfiles] lockfiles are generated; hand edits
desynchronize them from the manifest — run your package manager
(npm/pnpm/yarn/bun install) instead
ALLOW src/app.ts
checked 2 paths: 1 allow, 1 block, 0 warn, 0 ask
exit code 1 — the commit / tool call is refused
$ fenceline check --explain "src/../package-lock.json"
BLOCK package-lock.json [zone lockfiles] lockfiles are generated; hand edits
desynchronize them from the manifest — run your package manager
(npm/pnpm/yarn/bun install) instead
1. lockfiles -> block: matched "package-lock.json" (op: edit)
traversal normalized away — the dodge lands on the same fence
$ fenceline hooks claude-code --write && fenceline hooks git --write
installed PreToolUse hook in .claude/settings.json
installed .git/hooks/pre-commit
lockfiles · migrations · generated code · one fence file · agent hooks + pre-commit · zero deps
